name: pwSh
description: Initialize or use the in-memory PowerShell runner.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

input_file.description: Custom runner DLL for init. Omit to use PowerShellRunner.dll.

type_for_dll.description: Fully-qualified runner type for custom init DLL.

script_path.description: PowerShell script path for import or script. The module searches the release Tools directory.
